headline: The $119,000 Early Buy Advantage: Realtor.com® Report Finds Home Purchase Timing Reshapes Generational Wealth
summary: The path to the American Dream is increasingly defined by timing, according to the newly released Generational Wealth Report from Realtor.com®. The report reveals a stark "wealth multiplier" for those able to enter the market early: households that purchase their first home by age 30 see a 22.5% higher net worth—an average of $119,000 more—by age 50 compared to those who wait until their 40s.
